contracts.project: Downtown Street Improvements and Plaza – Phase 2
contracts.limits: Main Street from John Elliott to North County Road/South County Road
contracts.notes: Professional civil engineering services for downtown street improvements including design, survey, geotechnical services, subsurface utility engineering, bid phase services, record documents, public engagement, and construction phase services for Main Street reconstruction.

contracts.project: Downtown Street Improvements and Plaza – Phase 2
contracts.notes: Professional services for design engineering, survey, geotechnical services, SUE, franchise utility coordination and design, ROW and easement instruments, visualizations, planning/development support, and construction phase services (inspection and administration) for downtown street improvements and plaza project.

contracts.project: Dallas Parkway Phase 4 Improvements
contracts.limits: Lebanon Road to Panther Creek Parkway
contracts.notes: Design and bid package preparation for roadway improvements to Dallas Parkway including lane extensions and turn lane modifications at Eldorado Parkway intersections.

contracts.project: Dallas Parkway — Lebanon Road to Panther Creek Parkway
contracts.limits: Lebanon Road to Panther Creek Parkway
contracts.notes: Design engineering services for Dallas Parkway improvement project including preliminary and final design, environmental, surveying, geotechnical, hydraulic modeling, signal design modifications at multiple intersections, and construction administration services.

contracts.project: Sanitary Sewer Smoke Testing – FY23
contracts.notes: Sanitary sewer smoke testing services including project administration, public notifications, smoke testing field work, data management, and analysis to identify infiltration/inflow sources with rehabilitation recommendations for the City's wastewater system.

contracts.project: Stewart Creek Restoration and Conceptual Design
contracts.limits: Approximately 6.75 miles of stream from Parkwood Drive to confluence with Lake Lewisville
contracts.notes: Master agreement for professional services to review existing studies and utility assets, prepare conceptual designs and restoration options for Stewart Creek, coordinate with USACE for permitting, and identify external funding sources for environmental remediation and restoration work.

contracts.project: Taychas Bridge Approach Repairs
contracts.limits: Bridge approach approximately 30 feet from both ends of bridge
contracts.notes: Engineering services for assessing and repairing bridge approach settlements on both north and south ends of Taychas Trail Bridge, including investigation, geotechnical analysis, construction document preparation, and construction administration.

contracts.project: Edgewood Subdivision Streambank Stability
contracts.limits: West Rowlett Creek and tributaries between Coit Road and Independence Parkway
contracts.notes: Professional civil engineering services for erosion control and bank stabilization repairs at nine locations along West Rowlett Creek and its tributaries, including design, permitting, construction administration, and record documents.

contracts.project: Davis Park & Trail Improvements
contracts.limits: approximately 400 linear feet of multi-use trail
contracts.notes: Design and engineering services for a new multi-use concrete trail connecting Davis Park Trail Leg 1 under an existing BNSF railroad bridge to a proposed pedestrian bridge, including trail awning structure design, permitting, landscape architecture, drainage, hardscape, lighting, water resources analysis, environmental assessment, cultural resource assessment, and construction observation services.

contracts.project: PGA Parkway — Preston Road to Coit Road
contracts.limits: Approximately 10,000 feet (PGA Parkway); approximately 750 feet (Hillcrest Road extension)
contracts.notes: Planning and design engineering services for the preparation of construction contract documents to improve PGA Parkway from a 2-lane asphalt section to a 6-lane divided concrete section, and extension of Hillcrest Road as a 2-lane concrete section. Services include design for maintenance of traffic, roadway paving, grading, drainage, utilities, retaining walls, landscaping, irrigation, illumination, land surveying, ROW parcel documents, subsurface utility engineering, geotechnical engineering, hydraulic modeling, and environmental evaluation.

contracts.project: Upper Reuse 24-Inch Pipeline Design and Bid Package Preparation
contracts.limits: From existing pipeline north of Wakeland High School to Frisco #2 ground storage tank
contracts.notes: Design and bid package preparation for Phase 2 and 3 of the Upper Reuse 24-inch pipeline project, extending from Warren Sports Complex to the Frisco #2 ground storage tank, including the section along proposed future Hillcrest Road.

contracts.project: 48" and 36" Water Main from Coit Road to Independence Parkway - Design
contracts.notes: Design and bid package preparation for 48" and 36" water transmission pipelines connecting future water storage and pumping facilities to address increased water demands.

contracts.project: 48" & 36" Water Main – Coit to Independence Water Line
contracts.limits: Approximately 4,500 linear feet of 48-inch pipe and 500 linear feet of 36-inch pipe
contracts.notes: Design of water distribution pipelines including two flow meter vaults, geotechnical services, survey, subsurface utility engineering, environmental services, traffic control plan, and construction phase services for water main connecting from proposed Frisco Pump Station No. 4 west through Villages at Willow Bay neighborhood to Coit Road.

contracts.project: Not specified in document chunk
contracts.notes: Architectural and engineering services agreement for a construction project, including design phases and construction administration.

contracts.project: 3rd Street and Maple Street Paving and Drainage Improvements
contracts.notes: Design and construction document preparation for paving and drainage improvements along 3rd Street and Maple Street, including sidewalk improvements, concrete curbing, and offsite surface drainage swale. Scope includes preliminary design, final design, bid phase services, and construction administration.

contracts.project: Luminant Tract Rail Siding and Spur
contracts.notes: Professional engineering services for the design and relocation of a rail siding and maintenance of way track for BNSF Railway and Frisco Wholesale Lumber facility relocation near PGA Parkway in Frisco. Phase 1D services include refining conceptual design, navigating utility easements, and executing term sheets with project stakeholders.

contracts.project: Stewart Creek Watershed Master Plan Update
contracts.notes: Update to the Master Drainage Plan for Stewart Creek watershed to incorporate new developments and improvements from the past six years and update hydrologic and hydraulic models to reflect current conditions.

contracts.project: Panther Creek Parkway - DNT to Preston Road
contracts.limits: approximately two miles from approximately 1,100-feet east of DNT to approximately 800-feet east of Preston Road
contracts.notes: Professional civil engineering services for design and construction administration of approximately two miles of Panther Creek Parkway from DNT to Preston Road, including roadway, drainage, bridges over Parvin Branch tributary and BNSF railroad, retaining wall, intersection improvements at Preston Road with traffic signal modifications, water line improvements, signage, pavement markings, street lighting, fiber conduit, erosion control, irrigation, and median landscaping.

contracts.project: Frisco No. 4 Pump Station and Ground Storage Tanks
contracts.notes: Professional civil engineering services for design and construction administration of a new pump station with initial 20 MGD capacity (expandable to 60 MGD) and two 10-MG ground storage tanks, including site improvements, pedestrian bridge, and trail design.

contracts.project: Frisco No. 4 Pump Station and Ground Storage Tanks
contracts.notes: Design engineering, environmental permitting, geotechnical investigation, topographical survey, easement preparation, construction administration, and construction management services for a new pump station and ground storage tanks project in Frisco, Texas.

contracts.project: Miscellaneous Intersection Improvements (FY 21)
contracts.limits: Six intersections: Preston Road at Main Street, Lebanon Road at FM 423, Wade Boulevard at Preston Road, Warren Parkway at Preston Road, Stonebrook Parkway at FM 423, Hillcrest Road at Ohio Drive
contracts.notes: Design services, survey, ROW/easement preparation, subsurface utility engineering, traffic signal modifications, bid phase services, and construction phase services for intersection improvements at six locations in Frisco.

contracts.project: CIP Tool, Phase 2
contracts.notes: Professional services for WISE planning tool development, including integration of utility and park dedication fee data, discovery of additional data sources for police, fire, and facilities projects, data processing, and development of a functional planning tool with presentation of deliverables.

contracts.project: Ohio Drive at Gaylord Parkway Roundabout
contracts.notes: Professional civil engineering services for conversion of unsignalized, stop-controlled intersection to multi-lane roundabout, including construction engineering inspection, project management, materials testing coordination, and construction administration for approximately 8 months of construction and 2 months of closeout.

contracts.project: Grand Park Site Analysis and Framework
contracts.notes: Professional services for site analysis, framework planning, market analysis, and economic study for Grand Park, a 1,000-acre property in Frisco, Texas. Work includes inventory diagrams, suitability analysis, market feasibility assessment, and development of up to three framework strategy plans.

contracts.project: On-Call Professional Survey Services Master Agreement
contracts.notes: Master agreement for on-call professional survey services including topographic survey, right-of-way determination and verification, boundary survey and platting, deed research, utility and infrastructure services, and construction verification to support Engineering Services.

contracts.project: Teel and Timber Ridge Elevated Storage Tank Condition Assessment
contracts.notes: Professional civil engineering services for internal cleaning, visual inspection, condition assessment, and coatings evaluation of two 2.5 MG elevated storage tanks, including technical memorandum with life cycle cost analysis and opinion of probable construction cost.

contracts.company: DryTec Moisture Protection Technology Consultants, Inc.
contracts.project: Building Envelope Consulting for Frisco Athletic Center
contracts.notes: Roof replacement consulting services including design and construction administration phases for the Frisco Athletic Center. Scope includes site visits, construction document preparation, bid phase assistance, submittal reviews, and up to 8 roofing-related site visits during construction.

contracts.project: Stewart Creek North Interceptor – Phase 4
contracts.notes: Design and bid package preparation for Stewart Creek North Interceptor Phase 4, including contaminated soil staking, field survey, tree survey analysis, and pipeline redesign to address easement acquisition issues and incorporate project improvements.

contracts.project: Stewart Creek North Interceptor – Phase 4
contracts.notes: Design of wastewater interceptor (12-inch to 36-inch diameter) and 8-inch collector pipe connections in Stewart Creek Basin. Includes survey, geotechnical services, easement preparation, SUE, environmental services, permitting support, bid phase services, construction phase services, and record documents.

contracts.project: Bacchus Park Bridge Approach Repairs
contracts.notes: Final design professional services for Bacchus Park Bridge Approach Repairs project, including project management, data collection, foundation analysis, construction documents, geotechnical services, and construction administration.

contracts.project: Stephen's Green Pedestrian Bridge Approach Repairs
contracts.notes: Final design professional services for pedestrian bridge approach repairs, including project management, data collection, site investigation, foundation analysis, construction documents, geotechnical services, and construction administration.

contracts.project: Frisco #4 - North Texas Municipal Water District 54" pipeline and meter design
contracts.limits: Independence Parkway to NTMWD Meter location on pump station site
contracts.notes: Design and bid package preparation for a 54-inch water supply pipeline from the North Texas Municipal Water District transmission line to a proposed meter location, including survey, geotechnical services, pipeline and meter design, environmental services, subsurface utility investigations, easement documents, and permitting.

contracts.project: Frisco #4 — NTMWD 54" Pipeline and Meter Design
contracts.notes: Professional civil engineering services for design of a North Texas Municipal Water District water delivery site and 54-inch water supply line, including hydraulic analysis, preliminary through final design, bid phase services, and construction administration.

contracts.project: On-Call Franchise Utility Coordination
contracts.notes: Master on-call agreement for franchise utilities coordination services on capital improvement projects, supporting engineering services from design through construction to reduce project delays due to utility conflicts.

contracts.project: Iron Horse Hike & Bike Trail
contracts.notes: Design services for a 3.5-mile shared-use concrete trail and bridge crossings connecting Grand Park, Big Blue Stem Trail, Beavers Bend Park, and other regional destinations along Stewart Creek tributary between Stonebrook Parkway and Lebanon Road. Scope includes surveying, hydraulic/hydrologic analysis, environmental services, preliminary and final design, and construction administration.

contracts.project: Parkwood Boulevard/Cotton Gin Road Water Line and Transfer Valve
contracts.notes: Design and bid package preparation for a water line and transfer valve project on Parkwood Boulevard/Cotton Gin Road, with alignment adjustments to accommodate developments and tie-in location changes.

contracts.project: Legacy Drive elevated storage tank - design services
contracts.notes: Design phase services for residual control system improvements at the City's 1.5-million-gallon Legacy Drive elevated storage tank, including Technical Memorandum preparation, performance specification creation for the Residual Control System and mixing system, and submission to TCEQ for approval.

contracts.project: Legacy Elevated Storage Tank Chloramine Residual Improvements
contracts.notes: Design phase and construction administration services for chloramine residual control system improvements at the City's 1.5 million gallon Legacy Elevated Storage Tank, including chemical storage and metering system design, basis of design development, regulatory submissions to TCEQ, and construction phase oversight.

contracts.project: Frisco Parks, Open Space and Recreation Master Plan
contracts.notes: Development of a comprehensive Parks, Open Space and Recreation Master Plan including community engagement, stakeholder analysis, brand concept development, and park classification system.

contracts.project: Stewart Creek at Legacy Drive Bank Stabilization
contracts.limits: Stewart Creek downstream of Legacy Drive
contracts.notes: Design and preparation of construction documents for creek bank stabilization to prevent erosion and protect existing development and electrical transmission tower.

contracts.project: ADA Transition Plan Services
contracts.notes: Professional services for development of an ADA Transition Plan for the City of Frisco, including accessibility assessment and planning documentation.

contracts.project: Sanitary Sewer System Evaluation Services
contracts.limits: 232,466 LF of sanitary sewer across five areas
contracts.notes: Smoke testing of sanitary sewer system to identify leaks and infiltration points, with prioritized repair recommendations. Service covers five City areas totaling approximately 232,466 linear feet of sanitary sewer.

contracts.project: Year 1 Erosion Mitigation Sites
contracts.limits: Three sites: Dallas North Tollway @ Draw (between Stonebrook Pkwy and Cotton Gin Rd), Dallas North Tollway @ Draw (North of Stonebrook Pkwy), Parkwood Blvd @ Stewart Creek (North of Eagan Way)
contracts.notes: Professional engineering and surveying services for design, bidding, and construction phase services for erosion mitigation repairs and improvements at three locations along Dallas North Tollway and Parkwood Boulevard, including roadway repairs, guardrail replacement, headwall repairs, channel armoring, and topographic survey.

contracts.project: Engineering and Surveying Services
contracts.notes: Professional services agreement for engineering and surveying services including design services, bidding services, construction services, topographic survey, and related expenses.

contracts.project: Stewart Creek Master Plan Updates 2023
contracts.limits: approximately 42 stream miles; Stewart Creek Main Stem approximately 10 miles with 29 tributaries
contracts.notes: Amendment to update hydrologic and hydraulic master models for Stewart Creek watershed to include new developments and current conditions. Additional services include refinement of hydraulic modeling at Preston Vineyard Drive and Preston Road intersection using 2D modeling approaches.

contracts.project: Shepherds Glen Park Reinvestment
contracts.notes: Design services for park reinvestment including splash pad expansion, playground elements, shade structures, parking, pedestrian paths, native landscape restoration, interpretative signage, and public art improvements at Shepherds Glen Park.

contracts.project: Buffalo Ridge Neighborhood Park
contracts.notes: Final design professional engineering services for Buffalo Ridge Neighborhood Park, including construction documents, bidding assistance, and construction observation services. Scope includes landscape architectural and civil, structural, geotechnical, and electrical engineering services.

contracts.project: Roger's Settlement Park & Trails
contracts.notes: Professional services agreement for landscape architectural and engineering design of Roger's Settlement Park and Trails, including construction documents, bidding assistance, and construction observation services. Project scope includes trail design, playground areas, site furnishings, native meadow restoration, dog park, parking lot, signage, lighting, irrigation, and plantings.

contracts.project: Panther Creek Pkwy Reuse Line
contracts.notes: Owner's Representative Services and engineering design for a reuse water line project in Panther Creek Parkway, including alignment study, intermediate and final design (60%-100%), topographical survey, subsurface utility engineering (SUE), and general construction representation.

contracts.project: Bungala Lane and Rock Creek Parkway Streambank Stabilization
contracts.limits: Site A: approximately 130 LF; Site B: approximately 200 LF
contracts.notes: Professional civil engineering services for stream bank stabilization improvements at two sites along Tributary 2 of Stewart Creek, including design services, topographic survey, hydraulic analysis, environmental and archeological study, geotechnical investigations, bid phase services, and construction administration. The project evaluates alternative stabilization measures (hard-armored or soft-armored solutions) and includes feasibility study for existing sanitary sewer line relocation.

contracts.project: Master Agreement for On-Call Professional Drainage Engineering Services
contracts.limits: September 30, 2026 (with option to extend to September 30, 2027)
contracts.notes: On-call professional drainage engineering services including review guidelines preparation, drainage study review, and drainage engineering studies for floodplain analysis and storm drain design work.

contracts.project: Master Agreement for On-Call Drainage Engineering Services
contracts.notes: On-call professional civil engineering services for drainage-related work including review guidelines preparation, drainage study review, drainage engineering studies, storm drain analysis, floodplain studies, downstream assessments, and FEMA submittals.

contracts.project: Performing Arts Venue
contracts.notes: First Amendment to consulting services agreement for a performing arts venue, including Phase One extension through October 2024 and Phase Two services (October 2024 – July 2025) covering concept design team selection, facility concept design coordination, project management, and partnership program development.

contracts.project: Dallas Parkway — Lebanon Road to Panther Creek Parkway
contracts.limits: Lebanon Road to Panther Creek Parkway
contracts.notes: Professional services for design and construction administration of Dallas Parkway project, including preliminary design, final design, environmental services, surveying, geotechnics, and construction administration.

contracts.project: Grand Park – Phase 1A Design and Documentation
contracts.limits: 1,000 acres (330 acres core park); 6,350 linear feet of 12-inch water reuse line
contracts.notes: Comprehensive landscape architecture and engineering design services for Grand Park Phase 1A, including schematic design, design development, construction documents, bidding and negotiation, and construction observation. Scope includes civil engineering, architecture, structural engineering, MEP engineering, pond design, irrigation, lighting, wayfinding, water features, ecological design, and surveying for a 1,000-acre park development with estimated $43 million construction budget.

contracts.project: PGA Parkway — Preston Road to Coit Road
contracts.limits: PGA Parkway approximately 10,000 feet; Hillcrest Road approximately 750 feet
contracts.notes: Planning and design engineering services for improvement of PGA Parkway from 2-lane asphalt to 6-lane divided concrete section, and extension of Hillcrest Road as 2-lane concrete section. Services include design for traffic maintenance, roadway paving, grading, drainage, utilities, retaining walls, landscape, irrigation, illumination, surveying, ROW documentation, subsurface utility engineering, geotechnical engineering, hydraulic modeling, and environmental evaluation. Amendment Number Five addresses design revisions to accommodate adjacent development changes.

contracts.project: Lexington Neighborhood Parks
contracts.limits: Southern park site location 1 and trail phase site areas
contracts.notes: Landscape architecture and engineering design services for Lexington Neighborhood Parks including master planning, conceptual design, schematic design, design development, construction documents, bidding assistance, and construction phase services. Scope includes civil, structural, irrigation, geotechnical, and electrical engineering services.

contracts.project: Lexington Neighborhood Parks
contracts.notes: Professional services for design and planning of neighborhood parks including pre-design, concept design, schematic design, design development, construction documents, bidding assistance, and construction phase services. Scope includes topographic survey, tree inventory/tagging, preliminary and final platting for park and trail master planning through construction services.

contracts.project: Beavers Bend Park Reinvestment
contracts.notes: Landscape architecture and engineering design services for the re-design and renovation of Beavers Bend Neighborhood Park, including conceptual design, schematic design, design development, construction documents preparation, bidding assistance, and construction phase services.

contracts.project: Legacy Drive (Lebanon Rd to Stonebrook Pkwy) + Stonebrook Pkwy (4th Army Dr to Legacy Dr) + Stonebrook/Teel Pkwy intersection – design and bid package preparation
contracts.limits: N/A (project limits stated; length not provided)
contracts.notes: PSA for design + construction documents. Scope includes adding 3rd NB/SB lanes on Legacy Dr from Lebanon Rd to ~1,300’ north of Stonebrook Pkwy; adding 3rd EB lane on Stonebrook Pkwy from Edgestone Dr to Legacy Dr; adding 3rd WB lane on Stonebrook Pkwy from 4th Army Dr to Legacy Dr; adding dual left-turn lanes all directions at Stonebrook/Teel; and design of an 8” reuse water line to serve Beaver’s Bend Park. Design begins Q1 2025; construction expected Q3 2026; bond funded.

contracts.project: Legacy Drive and Stonebrook Parkway Improvements
contracts.limits: Legacy Drive from Lebanon Road to Stonebrook Parkway; Stonebrook Parkway from 4th Army Drive to Legacy Drive; Stonebrook Parkway/Teel Parkway intersection
contracts.notes: Design and bid package preparation for roadway lane additions on Legacy Drive (3rd northbound and southbound lanes) and Stonebrook Parkway (3rd eastbound and westbound lanes), dual left turn lanes at the Stonebrook Parkway/Teel Parkway intersection, and design of an 8-inch reuse water line to serve Beaver's Bend Park.

contracts.project: Legacy Drive and Stonebrook Parkway Design and Construction Documents
contracts.limits: Legacy Drive from Lebanon Road to Stonebrook Parkway; Stonebrook Parkway from 4th Army Drive to Legacy Drive; Stonebrook Parkway/Teel Parkway intersection
contracts.notes: Design and bid package preparation for roadway improvements including addition of third lanes on Legacy Drive and Stonebrook Parkway, dual left turn lanes at intersection, and design of 8" reuse water line for Beaver's Bend Park.

contracts.project: Legacy Drive Widening from Lebanon Road to Stonebrook Parkway & Stonebrook Parkway Widening from 4th Army Drive to Legacy Drive
contracts.limits: Legacy Drive: 8,400 linear feet (Lebanon Road to ~1,400 feet north of Stonebrook Parkway); Stonebrook Parkway: 3,600 linear feet (4th Army Drive to Legacy Drive)
contracts.notes: Professional civil engineering services for widening Legacy Drive and Stonebrook Parkway, including roadway design, traffic signal improvements, bridge condition assessment and repairs, reuse waterline design, topographic survey, geotechnical investigation, and right-of-way coordination.

contracts.project: 2021-2022 Frisco Engineering Standards Update (Amendment #1)
contracts.notes: Amendment No. 1 to the PSA originally approved 12/07/2021 for $96,200.00; amendment adds $103,800.00, bringing total contract to $200,000.00. Purpose: update standards to TxDOT 2024 Manual (from 2004), NCTCOG 5th Ed (2017) (from 4th Ed 2004), and incorporate new means/methods, materials, and technologies. Funded from Engineering Services Operations budget.

contracts.project: 2021-2022 Frisco Engineering Design Standards Update
contracts.notes: Amendment to professional services agreement for updating Frisco's engineering design standards, including technical specifications revisions, design standard revisions, and standard construction details revisions.

contracts.project: Frisco Street (Cobb Hill Dr to Panther Creek Pkwy) – design/bid package (Amendment #2)
contracts.limits: N/A (limits Cobb Hill Dr to Panther Creek Pkwy)
contracts.notes: Amendment #2 to PSA for additional design services to add a roundabout at Frisco St/Cobb Hill Dr. Includes additional topographic survey, roundabout construction plans, landscaping/irrigation within roundabout, additional ROW exhibits/revised plat, and cathodic protection design for 36" ductile iron water line. Prior: original PSA $561,835 (9/15/2020) + Amendment #1 $248,500 (3/21/2023). Funded with bonds.

contracts.project: Frisco Street from Cobb Hill Drive to Panther Creek Parkway - Amendment #2
contracts.limits: Frisco Street from Cobb Hill Drive to Panther Creek Parkway
contracts.notes: Amendment #2 to Professional Services Agreement for design and bid package preparation including roundabout design at Frisco Street/Cobb Hill Drive intersection, topographic survey, construction plans, landscaping/irrigation design, ROW exhibits, and cathodic protection design for water line.

contracts.project: Panther Creek Hike and Bike Trail - BNSF to Panther Creek Parkway
contracts.notes: Landscape architecture and engineering services for design of approximately 5,000 linear feet of 12-foot wide hike and bike trail with two prefabricated pedestrian bridge crossings over Panther Creek, including master planning, conceptual design, schematic design, design development, construction documents, and construction phase services.

contracts.project: Collinsbrook Farms Neighborhood Park – master plan + design + construction documents
contracts.notes: PSA for park master plan, design, and construction documents for a 7.5-acre neighborhood park at Coit Rd & PGA Pkwy; planned improvements include looping trail, playgrounds (2–5 and 5–12), shade structure, lighting, signage, on-street parking, landscaping, and provision for public art. Memo has a vendor name inconsistency (mentions SWA Group in Action Requested), but the PSA itself is between City and Dunaway. Funding: Park Dedication Funds.

contracts.project: Collinsbrook Neighborhood Park
contracts.notes: Professional landscape architectural, survey, and engineering services for park master plan development, site improvements design, and construction administration for an approximately 8-acre neighborhood park including playgrounds, pavilion, trails, basketball court, and recreational amenities.

contracts.project: Research Road Water Line Upsize
contracts.limits: Est. ~1.0 mi (Line Upsize N/A (length not stated) Amendment No. 1 to PSA (change order) for additional design/bid packag)
contracts.notes: Amendment No. 1 to PSA (change order) for additional design/bid package services; amendment amount $155,725.00; total PSA after amendment $324,595.00. Includes additional investigations such as geophysical work (noted ~375 LF along Cobb Hill Rd for one route option).

contracts.project: Research Road Water Line Upsize (Eldorado Parkway to Frisco Street)
contracts.notes: Professional services for design and engineering of water line upsizing project, including topographic survey, preliminary and final design plans, bid phase services, subsurface utility engineering, easement coordination, and construction phase services for the WL-B segment along Option B route.

contracts.project: Research Road Water Line Upsize
contracts.limits: 36" water line between Cobb Hill Drive and Frisco Street
contracts.notes: Amendment Number One to Professional Services Agreement for additional design services and bid package preparation for water line upsizing project, including re-alignment of 36" water line, construction coordination for gate valve installation, valve manhole design, traffic control planning, and subsurface utility engineering.

contracts.project: Warren Parkway (Legacy Drive to Internet Boulevard) – design and bid package preparation
contracts.limits: ~0.9 miles (estimated along Warren Pkwy from Legacy Dr to Internet Blvd)
contracts.notes: PSA for design + construction documents; scope includes adding 3rd WB lane, 3rd EB lane, 2nd WB left-turn lane at Gaylord Pkwy/Warren Pkwy, and adding 3rd NB lane on Internet Blvd by removing median; design begins Q4 2025, construction expected Q1 2027; bond funded. Length estimate based on roadway segment between cross streets (not stated in agenda item).

contracts.project: Frisco Environmental Collection Center
contracts.notes: Architectural and engineering design services for a new environmental collection center facility on Executive Drive, including a 3,500 sq ft main building, 5,000 sq ft equipment building, dumpster area, containment area, and parking facilities.

contracts.project: City of Frisco/AIA for Frisco Environmental Collection Center
contracts.limits: 10-acre parcel on Executive Drive, south of PGA Parkway
contracts.notes: Architectural and engineering services for design and construction administration of a new environmental collection center campus. Services include schematic design, design development, construction documents, and construction phase oversight with structural, mechanical, and electrical engineering consultants.

contracts.project: Traffic Engineering Services (On-call master agreements; RFQ #2211-010 extension bridge)
contracts.notes: Not-to-exceed amount for this firm: $120,000.00. Categories: Traffic Engineering Studies. One-year master agreements used to bridge gap while City issues a new RFQ for multi-year on-call agreements; task orders issued per scope with defined budget; agreements expire 12/31/2026; funding via bond funds, TxDOT/NCTCOG grants, and Engineering operating budget.

contracts.project: Traffic Engineering Services (On-call master agreements; RFQ #2211-010 extension bridge)
contracts.notes: Not-to-exceed amount for this firm: $235,000.00. Categories: ITS Planning & Design; Urban Mobility. One-year master agreements used to bridge gap while City issues a new RFQ for multi-year on-call agreements; task orders issued per scope with defined budget; agreements expire 12/31/2026; funding via bond funds, TxDOT/NCTCOG grants, and Engineering operating budget.

contracts.project: John Hickman Parkway (DNT NBFR to Parkwood Blvd) – design & bid package
contracts.notes: PSA for design and bid package preparation to construct a new four-lane divided minor thoroughfare connection with street lighting, landscaping/irrigation, and a new traffic signal at JHP & Parkwood. Design anticipated to begin Q1 2026; construction expected Q1 2027.

contracts.project: Downtown 4th Street Plaza – additional design/construction support (Amendment #1)
contracts.notes: Amendment #1 to 2/21/2023 PSA (original $2,265,700) adding additional services during construction/field conditions and coordination with Main Street project (submittal/RFI review, mockups & site visits, branding/signage, utilities, lighting/irrigation, structural adjustments, extra meetings/documentation). Park Dedication funds.

contracts.project: Frisco Downtown Plaza
contracts.notes: Design services for the Frisco Downtown Plaza including 4th Street Plaza site structures, paving, grading, drainage, illumination, audio/visual, technology, landscaping/irrigation, and construction observation. Includes coordination with Main Street Project for aesthetic cohesion.

contracts.project: John Hickman Parkway Construction from Dallas North Tollway (DNT) Northbound Frontage Road (NBFR) to Parkwood Boulevard
contracts.limits: approximately 2,100 linear feet from DNT NBFR to Parkwood Boulevard
contracts.notes: Professional civil engineering services for the design and construction administration of John Hickman Parkway, a greenfield four-lane divided arterial roadway with associated drainage, sanitary sewer, traffic signal, landscape, irrigation, and illumination design.

contracts.company: Walter P Moore and Associates, Inc.
contracts.project: On-Call Drainage Engineering Services
contracts.notes: PSA for on-call drainage engineering; scope includes updates to citywide creek erosion study, hydrologic/hydraulic modeling, and other drainage support for development review, floodplain management, and Stormwater CIP. Funded by Stormwater Funds.

contracts.project: Cottonwood Creek Trail Extension – Phase 2
contracts.notes: Amendment #1 to existing PSA (originally approved 2022-08-02 for $290,500) to cover revised Segment 1 alignment/floodplain analysis and add new federally funded Segment 2 (~1.3 miles). Related: City awarded $4,048,000 in NCTCOG Transportation Alternatives funds; local match $1,012,000; construction programmed FY 2028.

contracts.project: Master Agreement for On-Call Professional Survey Services
contracts.notes: Master agreement for on-call professional survey services including topographic survey, right-of-way determination and verification, boundary survey and platting, deed research, utility and infrastructure services, and construction verification to support Engineering Services.

contracts.project: Fiber Optic Infrastructure Capital Investment Plan and Inventory
contracts.notes: Development of a comprehensive fiber optic infrastructure capital investment plan including master plans for multiple departments, cost estimation, project prioritization, GIS dashboard development, and field inventory of existing fiber infrastructure across City of Frisco's facilities, traffic signal system, water/sewer system, and police radio network.
